violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The kitchen handsink is lacking a hand-washing sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the rolling rack have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

A food employee failed to wash his/her hands after using a gloved hand to wipe their nose. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils and change in tasks. Employee informed and completed proper hygiene during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and other debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the office/storage area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

The ceiling and wall in the ice machine area and floors in boiler room have an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024
Low boy gaskets in service area were not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The refuse area has an accumulation of used equipment (barrels and soda returns) and leaf litter. PIC stated the area is shared with another establishment, equipment belongs to that establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have debris from construction. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Facility must clean and sanitize all surfaces prior to opening. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
